media_policy.reason: The Uoink corpus deletes source media after extraction.
media_policy.derived_frames_reason: A-Q6: small downscaled analysis thumbnails (<=360px JPEG) are committed so visual judgment criteria are scoreable; source media itself stays uncommitted.
media_policy.recovery: Refetch each canonical URL with yt-dlp and verify the frozen source-media SHA-256 before comparing measurements.

cases.truth_caveat: The published upload is not zero-cut raw footage: Lane A found a fast-cut montage around 20–30 seconds. The genuinely raw file is behind the video's external download link.
